name: bugglo
description: Read Robinhood Chain (4663) directly: rug checks, ownership, upgradeable-proxy and privileged-function disclosure. No API key, no account, no backend. Reports UNKNOWN as a first-class result — a check that did not run is never a check that passed.
author: itsnevu
//: viem, and nothing else. This package is what `npx bugglo` will install, and npx cold-start is the entire wow-moment budget. Every dependency added here is paid for by a stranger, in silence, before they see anything.
